root_cause.headline: Franchise stores on POS firmware 4.1.9 process the loyalty lookup inline, adding 18 seconds to order-confirm; push firmware 4.2.1 tonight.
root_cause.detail: Every franchise store showing the 22-second gap is running POS firmware 4.1.9. Version 4.1.9 processes the loyalty-program card lookup synchronously inside the order-confirm step, blocking the POS for an average of 18.2 seconds while the loyalty API round-trips. Corporate stores are on firmware 4.2.1, which moved the lookup async — loyalty confirm fires in the background and the POS confirms the order immediately. The remaining 4-second gap after the firmware factor is within normal variance. The fix is a POS firmware push to all franchise stores tonight, not next week.
root_cause.affected_cohort: Franchise stores on POS firmware 4.1.9 — all 847 franchise locations

without_wizard.label: Without dbt-wizard
without_wizard.summary: Question enters the analytics backlog. Ops Sync meets without the answer. Fix gets scheduled for next week.
narrative: COO files the question. It enters the analytics backlog at priority A.
Data engineer scopes the work Monday — four days after the Ops Sync.
Engineer writes SQL from scratch joining four silver models by hand.
Tests, YAML, and contract get bolted on at PR time. Sometimes.
Ops team cannot isolate root cause before the franchise call Friday.
Firmware fix gets scheduled for next Tuesday maintenance window.
$420K weekly comp-store sales drag continues for at least one more week.

with_wizard.label: With dbt-wizard
with_wizard.summary: Four sub-agents surface the upstreams, author the SQL, write the tests, and materialize the asset in 90 seconds. Root cause in hand before the 6-hour Ops Sync.
narrative: Explorer runs status and search. Returns the four silver upstream candidates.
Summary runs describe and lineage. Confirms join path and names the new grain.
Worker runs dbt_show on a 7-day dinner slice. Validates the proposed grain.
Worker authors fct_dt_speed_by_ownership_daypart_daily.sql with CTEs and final SELECT.
Verification writes the YAML — description, schema contract, 9 tests, ownership.
Worker materializes the table to Iceberg. Verification confirms downstream lineage.
COO presents root-cause finding to Ops Sync with 6 hours to spare. Firmware ships tonight.

hero.label: Root cause identified 6 hours before Ops Sync — firmware push ships tonight, not next week
hero.note: From COO question to materialized Iceberg gold table — versioned, tested, documented, lineage-tracked. The ops team now knows every franchise store on POS firmware 4.1.9 processes the loyalty lookup inline, adding 18 seconds to order-confirm. The fix is a firmware push to 847 franchise locations tonight. $420K weekly comp-store sales drag stops this weekend, not next.
